home.title: Wepisia
home.quote: “Xam-xam moo ngi ci gàtt: kenn du ko bokk.”
home.twoByTwoDesc: Xayma 2×2, odds ratio ak risk relatif.
home.biostatisticsDesc: Doon ci xayma gu puwãas ba ci nosukaay Mantel‑Haenszel, defle jëfandikoo yiy wax ci xam-xam.
home.aiDescription: Fànn sa jëfandikoo bu bawoo ci xarala bii.
home.geospatialDescription: Xoolal ay xayma épidémiologique ci karti yiy wax ak heatmaps yépp ak clusters yépp.
home.simulationDescription: Njàngale ay xayma épidémiologique yépp ak jëfandikoo bii.

settings.title: Tànk
settings.customizeApp: Yéppale applikasioŋ bu ma a bëgg
settings.compactModeDescription: Wàcc marge ak padding ngir wone lu ëpp
settings.notificationDurationDescription: Wàllu ci bi xibaar dafa dëgge
settings.hapticFeedbackDescription: Wëccu jumtukaay bi xibaar di wone

stdMortalityCalculator.title: Bokkatu SMR
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Weetuwaay ak xayma yu deeg.
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Ngir wàllu yu tuuti (gis ≤ 5), fenn mbay yu yépp (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.jstatMissing: jStat du gis – cig wertu diggante yu yépp ak p-wertu dafa fari.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Deeg dafa {{percent}}% ëpp ci bi ñu nan.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Deeg dafa {{percent}}% tuuti ci bi ñu nan.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Deeg bu ëpp dafa gëna diggante.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Deeg bu tuuti dafa gëna diggante.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Dimbali du gëna diggante (CI am na 1.0).
stdMortalityCalculator.reportFooter: Bokkatu SMR – Njariñug xayma ngir weetuwaay
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: SMR (Wertu deeg bu wéy) mooy wertu ci diggante deeg yi ñu gis ak deeg yi ñu nan su nit ki ame wertu wu wéy.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: CI moo wone leegi jëmm bi dëgg. Su ame 1.0, jëmm bi du dëgg.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: Ba tax ci Poisson ak χ². Tàgg ci tuuti.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Wéyug test wu yépp, bu fës.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Waxtaanug Rothman & Boice (1979), dëgg su O > 5.

introduction.subtitle: Wër bu pexe ci módul yu xam-xamug weetuwaay ak wetti.

stdMortalityCalculator.title: Bokkatu SMR
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Weetuwaay ak xayma yu deeg.
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Ngir wàllu yu tuuti (gis ≤ 5), fenn mbay yu yépp (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Deeg dafa {{percent}}% ëpp ci bi ñu nan.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Deeg dafa {{percent}}% tuuti ci bi ñu nan.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Ëpp bi dafa gëna diggante (CI dafa àdduna 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Tuuti bi dafa gëna diggante (CI dafa àdduna 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Dimbali du gëna diggante (CI am na 1,0).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: Wertu deeg bu wéy (SMR) mooy wertu ci diggante deeg yi ñu gis ak deeg yi ñu nan su nit ki ame wertu wu wéy.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: CI bu amul 1,0 moo wone diggante.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: CI wu yéppu Garwood (1936) ba tax ci χ². Testu Poisson wu yépp. Mbayu OpenEpi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Testu Mid-Pu Lancaster (1961). Du fës wu yépp. CI ci bisection.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Waxtaanug Byar (Rothman & Boice, 1979). Dëgg su obs ≥ 1.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRgDesc: CI log-normal : exp(ln(SMR) ± z/√obs). Rothman & Greenland (1998).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpChi2Desc: Testu χ² Pearson (1 ddl). Du jox CI.

twoByTwoTable.title: Téereelu 2×2
twoByTwoTable.description: Wone luy jëme ci diggante woonu ak feebar.
twoByTwoTable.explanation: Téereelu 2×2 mooy bind woonu (dëgg/deedeet) ak feebar (dëgg/deedeet). Xayma yi ñu jox: testu Fisher, mid-p, χ², odds ratio, deeg bu yore, dimbali ci deeg, ak wàllu etiologique.

proportions.title: Proportsioŋ
proportions.description: Xayma proportsioŋ ak cig wertu diggante.
proportions.exactClopperPearson: • Wu yépp (Clopper-Pearson) : ba tax ci binomial
proportions.useCaseDescription: Ci nit 500, 75 dafa wone. Proportsioŋ wu dëgg mooy ?

proportionsSample.title: Magetu wetti ci proportsioŋ
proportionsSample.explanation: Módul bi moo xayma magetu wetti bu ñu bëgg ngir xayma proportsioŋ.
proportionsSample.exampleDescription: Ngir xayma proportsioŋ 20% ak dëgg-wàll ±3% ak tànngu diggante 95% :

oneRate.title: Testu tànn bu Benn
oneRate.explanation: Wone tànn bu gis ak tànn bu nan, walla xayma CI. Jëfandikoo Poisson ngir feebar yu tuuti.
oneRate.exampleDescription: Ci kohort bu nit 10 000 ci at 5, gis nañu feebar 25.

compareTwoRates.title: Dimbali ci tànni ñaar
compareTwoRates.explanation: Wone tànni ñaar yi nit-wàllu. Jox tànn wertu (rate ratio) ak dimbali ci tànn ak CI, ak testu Mantel-Haenszel.
compareTwoRates.exactPoissonBasedTest: Testu wu yépp ba tax ci Poisson

anova.title: ANOVA bu Benn
anova.description: Wone diggante ci kumpaŋ ñett walla ëpp.
anova.explanation: ANOVA (Xibaarug wàll) moo test diggante yi ñepp nekk nañu. Dafa wàllu wàll bu àdduna.

tTest.title: Test t Student
tTest.explanation: Test t moo wone diggante ñaar. Jox nañu test t Student (wàllu ñepp) ak test t Welch (wàllu yees).
tTest.hartleyFTest: Testu F Hartley ngir wone wàllu

meanConfidenceInterval.title: Cig wertu diggante ci diggante
meanConfidenceInterval.explanation: Xayma CI diggante ci wetti (n, diggante, écart-type). Jëfandikoo t Student.

meanDifferencePower.title: Fàtt ngir dimbali ci diggante
meanDifferencePower.explanation: Fàtt mooy leegi bu ñu dëgg. Módul bi dafa xayma ci magetu wetti, dimbali bu ñu nan, ak wàllu.

meanDifferenceSample.title: Magetu wetti ngir dimbali ci diggante
meanDifferenceSample.explanation: Xayma magetu wetti ngir gis dimbali.

medianPercentileCi.title: Cig wertu diggante ngir diggante ak pérsɛntil
medianPercentileCi.explanation: Xayma CI diggante ak pérsɛntil (25e, 75e) ci binomial.

unmatchedCaseControl.title: Xibaarug kes-vidhibiti yu bindul
unmatchedCaseControl.description: Wone luy jëme ci diggante woonu ak feebar.
unmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Módul bi dafa xibaar data kes-vidhibiti yu bindul. Dafa xayma OR, CI 95%, ak testu χ² Mantel-Haenszel.

sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.title: Magetu wetti (kes-vidhibiti yu bindul)
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Xayma magetu wetti ci kes-vidhibiti yu bindul. Dafa xayma ci tànngu diggante, fàtt, woonu ci vidhibiti, ak OR.

matchedCaseControl.title: Xibaarug kes-vidhibiti yu bind
matchedCaseControl.explanation: Ngir kes-vidhibiti yu bind, módul bi dafa xayma OR Mantel-Haenszel, CI, ak testu McNemar.

cohort.title: Xibaarug kohort
cohort.description: Xayma deeg bu yore, dimbali ci deeg, ak wàllu etiologique.
cohort.explanation: Ci kohort, kumpaŋ yu woon ak ba woonul dafa tàcc. Módul bi dafa xayma RR, RD, ak wàllu etiologique.

rct.title: Essai randomisé (RCT)
rct.explanation: Jox RR, ARR, NNT, ak CI.

screening.title: Xibaarug test
screening.description: Sensibilité, spécificité, wertu yu wone, likelihood ratios.
screening.explanation: Xibaar test ak gold standard. Jox sensibilité, spécificité, VPP, VPN, likelihood ratios, Youden, Kappa.

doseResponse.title: Tànk-Jaabi (χ² tendance)
doseResponse.description: Testu tendance linéaire ci woon yu ëpp.
doseResponse.explanation: Mantel-Haenszel χ² tendance linéaire. Jox p-wertu 1 ddl.
doseResponse.multipleStrata: Mën nañu bind wàllu yu ëpp.

rByCTable.title: Teereelu R x C
rByCTable.explanation: Xibaar teereelu R (rëy) × C (tànk). Jox χ² Pearson, G², coefficient de contingence, V Cramer.
rByCTable.associationBloodGroupDisease: Luy jëme ci diggante deret ak feebar (3 kumpaŋ × 4)

randomNumbers.title: Bokkatu lim yi ci yoon
randomNumbers.description: Bokkatu lim yi ngir randomisation ak wetti.
randomNumbers.explanation: Bokkatu lim uniforme, normale, binomiale, Poisson. Mën nañu bokkatu randomisation.

simulation.description: Wetti feebar biy tàmbali ci régiyoŋ yu bind.
simulation.explanation1: Módul bi dafa wetti feebar ci régiyoŋ. Régiyoŋ bu nekk am na nit ak S, E, I, R, D, Q. Régiyoŋ dafa bind ak nit yu yàgg.
simulation.explanation2: Jëfandikoo ODE. Mën nañu wéy β, sigma, gamma, mu, mobility. Wone ci map, graph, network.
simulation.seird: SEIRD : S, E, I, R, D
simulation.seiqrd: SEIQRD : S, E, I, Q, R, D
simulation.evolutionCurves: Kurb yi : S, E, I, R, D
simulation.lateIntervention: Intervention ci kanam : confinement S50, R₀=3.0
simulation.graphs: Graph : Ligne | Épaisseur | Remplissage | Grille | Annotations
simulation.step2: Tàcc Démarrer. Wone ci map ak graph.
simulation.step4: Ñeel comparaison ngir wetti ak tànk yu niikk.
simulation.technicalNote: Wàllu 1 siku. Mobility dafa ba tax ci wàllu prevalence.

geospatial.explanation1: Mën nañu yépp data CSV walla Excel, wone ci points, clusters, heatmap.
geospatial.explanation2: AI dafa wone résumé, tendances, alertes.
geospatial.multiLayers: Calques yu ëpp. Mën nañu wéy couleur, rayon, opacité.
geospatial.heatmapConfig: Heatmap : Rayon 25 | Flou 15 | Opacité min | Dégradé
geospatial.note: Dataset bu nekk am na tànk a.
geospatial.step1: Yépp CSV ak latitude, longitude, kes.
geospatial.step4: Tàcc Analyser ngir gis AI raport.

workspace.explanation1: WebR – mën nañu bind, yépp, maan kood R. Console, graph.
workspace.explanation2: Maana script, gestion fichiers, console, graph, packages.
workspace.multiFileEditor: Fichier yu ëpp : onglets. Dëggu localStorage.
workspace.interactiveConsoleFeature: Console : bind R, flèches history, graph.
workspace.animationBetaDetail: Animation (bêta) : script bu maan graph yu ëpp, mën nañu wone animation.
workspace.animationNote: Animation dafa jëfandikoo sequence, ba dëggul.
workspace.packageNote: Packages yu bëgg système du yépp.
workspace.codeExample:
# Courbe épidémique
x <- seq(-5, 10, length.out = 200)
for (i in 1:40) {
  mu <- i / 8
  y <- dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = 1.5)
  plot(x, y, type="n", ylim=c(0, 0.3), axes=FALSE)
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)), c(y, rep(0, 200)), col="#3b82f622", border=NA)
  lines(x, y, col="#3b82f6", lwd=3)
  Sys.sleep(0.04)
}
workspace.step4: Jëfandikoo flèches walla but ngir animation. Mën nañu yépp image.

explorer.explanation1: PubMed NCBI. Mën nañu ceet, filtre, gis résumé.
explorer.advancedSearch: Ceet : mots‑clés, filtre at, type article, tri.
explorer.favoritesExport: Favoris & export : 200 article. Export RIS (EndNote, Zotero).
explorer.results: Jëmm : bascule ceet/favoris, détails article, graph.
explorer.step5: Bascule Favoris, Export tout ngir gis RIS.

analysis.title: IA
analysis.description: IA na ngi di wone — insights, cluster, recommandations.

settings.timelineDescription: Slider wàllu — data dëgg na ngi.
settings.comparisonNoDatasets: Yépp dataset yu ëpp ngir xibaar.
settings.comparisonHint: Yépp wett yu ëpp ngir xibaar.

modal.title: Wett
modal.description: Data dëgg — OMS, Johns Hopkins, CEREMUJER.

toasts.formatError: Format ba nekkul — CSV walla Excel

empty_state.title: Tàmbali wetti
empty_state.description: Ñeel feebar walla scénario ngir tàmbali.

data_modal.title: Yépp data
data_modal.csv_label: CSV — régiyoŋ (colonnes: id, name, population, S, E, I, R, D, latitude, longitude, color, connections, cluster)

explanation_modal.title: Xibaar
explanation_modal.slider_body: Tàcc slider ngir gis wàllu. Map ak dashibord dafa wone.
explanation_modal.rt_body: Rt = R0 × S/N × (1 − réductions). Rt < 1 feebar dafa tàcc.

terms.title: Yooni jëfandikoo
terms.subtitle: Wepisia
terms.summary: Jàmm nga jàng yooni jëfandikoo bi ci lu bari ba leen jëfandikoo Wepisia. Su ngay jëfandikoo bi, nga am sol bu yoon yi.
terms.freeAndOpenDesc: Wepisia moo ngi liggéey ci nguur gi MIT. Yaw nga am solo jëfandikoo, ko toppat, ba koy defar, te jox it.
terms.openSourceDesc: Xëtu kood yi muy ci GitHub, bu jëkk moo xam, te am na fa benn jàmm.
terms.noWarrantyDesc: Wepisia moo ngi liggéey, du garab. Yaw nga ci yamale.
terms.acceptanceDesc: Su ngay jëfandikoo Wepisia, nga am sol bu yoon yi.
terms.acceptanceDetail: Yooni jëfandikoo yi moo ngi jëfandikoo bi. Su nga bañ ci yoon yi, nga du jëfandikoo bi.
terms.useDesc: Wepisia moo ngi xam-xam ci épidémiologie ak biostatistiques, bu jàng, bu laaj ak bu jàngale.
terms.prohibitedCommercial: Jëfandikoo bi jëfandikoo ci xaalis, te du wone
terms.prohibitedMisuse: Jëfandikoo bi jëfandikoo ci làkk bu ko bokk, bu jële jëfandikoo
terms.prohibitedIllegal: Jëfandikoo bi ci làkk bu bokk, ci yooni àdduna
terms.ipDesc: Wepisia moo ngi ci nguur gi MIT.
terms.ipDetail: Kood yi moo ngi ci nguur gi MIT. Yaw nga am solo jëfandikoo, toppat, ba koy defar, te jox it. Turu 'Wepisia', 'Xcept-Health' ak ci yaatu yi moo ngi ci Xcept-Health.
terms.licenseNotice: Nguur gi MIT – xool LICENSE ci GitHub.
terms.disclaimerDesc: Jëfandikoo bi moo ngi ci làkk bu 'bu dëgg', du garab.
terms.disclaimerDetail: Wepisia du garab. Du baax, du gën. Yaw nga ci yamale.
terms.disclaimerMedical: Xam-xam bu laafu: Wepisia moo ngi xam-xam ci xayma ak simulation. Du ndaw bu laafu. Xam-xam bi moo ngi jëfandikoo ci lu bari, lu bari. Yaw nga ci yamale.
terms.liabilityDetail: Xcept-Health ak ci yaatu yi du am yoon bu jëfandikoo Wepisia.
terms.changesDetail: Ñu njiit yoon yi. Njiitu yoon yi moo ngi ci xëtu bi. Su ngay jëfandikoo bi, nga am sol bu yoon yi.
